item.title: gardener/gardener-extension-provider-alicloud - v1.69.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-provider-alicloud:v1.69.0]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] This extension now supports shoot clusters with Kubernetes version 1.35. You should consider the Kubernetes release notes before upgrading to 1.35. by @rfranzke [#874]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Updated dependency gardener/gardener to v1.134.2 (Release Notes). by @plkokanov [#867]
  • [OPERATOR] Remove terraformer reconciler for infrastructure resources by @kevin-lacoo [#871]
  • [OPERATOR] The .spec.trafficDistribution field of the topology-aware Services will be automatically switched from the deprecated PreferClose to the new PreferSameZone option for Kubernetes 1.34+. by @Kostov6 [#875]
  • [OPERATOR] The gardener.cloud-fast StorageClass is now updated with allowVolumeExpansion=true to correctly reflect that it supports volume resize when the Gardener volume provider is CSI (gardener.seed.volumeProvider=csi). by @ialidzhikov [#865]
  • [OPERATOR] Fixed DNSRecords not reconciling in runtime cluster because of missing namespace permissions by @kevin-lacoo [#884]

Helm Charts

  • admission-alicloud-application: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/charts/gardener/extensions/admission-alicloud-application:v1.69.0

  • provider-alicloud: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/charts/gardener/extensions/provider-alicloud:v1.69.0

Container (OCI) Images

item.title: gardener/auditlog-forwarder - v0.2.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/auditlog-forwarder:v0.2.0]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] Http output now implements an internal retry mechanism. by @dimityrmirchev [#51]
  • [USER] Metrics port enabled on the main container for newly introduces Prometheus counters: total, succeeded and failed audit event log forwards. by @dimityrmirchev [#44]
  • [USER] The forwarder now supports multiple outputs. Delivery mode can be either Guaranteed or BestEffort. Only one of the multiple outputs can be set as Guaranteed. by @dimityrmirchev [#57]

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • [DEVELOPER] Ensure that the format make recipe is called during code generation. by @dimityrmirchev [#16]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Auditlog forwarder is now built with Go 1.25.5 by @dependabot[bot] [#37]
  • [OPERATOR] auditlog-forwarder is now built with go 1.26.0 by @dependabot[bot] [#50]
  • [OPERATOR] auditlog-forwarder is now built with go 1.26.1. by @dependabot[bot] [#63]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following third party dependencies have been updated:
- github.com/gardener/gardener v1.131.2 -> v1.132.1 - k8s.io/apimachinery v0.34.0 -> v0.34.1 - k8s.io/apiserver v0.34.0 -> v0.34.1 - k8s.io/component-base v0.34.0 -> v0.34.1 - sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime v0.22.0 -> v0.22.4 - golang.org/x/sync v0.17.0 -> v0.18.0 - golang.org/x/sys v0.37.0 -> v0.38.0 - golang.org/x/term v0.36.0 -> v0.37.0 - golang.org/x/text v0.30.0 -> v0.31.0 by @dependabot[bot] [#31]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following third party dependencies have been updated:

item.title: gardener/oidc-apps-controller - v0.22.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/oidc-apps-controller:v0.22.0]

⚠️ Breaking Changes

  • [OPERATOR] The imagevector.OverrideEnv constant has been renamed from IMAGEVECTOR_OVERRIDE to IMAGEVECTOR_OVERWRITE. WithEnvOverride now expects the environment variable to contain a file path to a YAML override file instead of constructing per-image environment variable names. Update any deployments or scripts that set IMAGEVECTOR_OVERRIDE_* environment variables to instead set IMAGEVECTOR_OVERWRITE to the path of an image vector override YAML file. by @Niki Dokovski [gardener/oidc-apps-controller@25ca94e094ad5683e2849f1b36cee14b6a70c694]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Tool dependencies (golangci-lint, gosec, govulncheck, gotestsum, gci, mockgen, setup-envtest, addlicense) have been extracted into a dedicated tools/go.mod module, removing them from the root go.mod to reduce dependency noise. by @Niki Dokovski [gardener/oidc-apps-controller@07cd5ba5fb5ba89cbb2ef9af0ad11327d95bee64]

Helm Charts

item.title: gardenlinux/glci - 1.3.1
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Update dependencies by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/319
  • Simplify OpenStack publishing by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/331
  • Simplify Azure publishing by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/332
  • Simplify AWS publishing by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/333
  • Limit Aliyun parallelism by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/334
  • Simplify credential validation by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/336
  • Simplyfy GLCI publishing targets by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/318
  • Improve Vault reliablity by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/351
  • fix: s/openstackbaremeral/openstackbaremetal/ by @nkraetzschmar in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/354
  • Update dependencies by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/356
  • Temporarily disable OpenStack ap-sa-2 by @Gchbg in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/357
  • Fix integration test for older test releases
  • Support multiple users of the same credentials
  • Improve logging output for removal
  • Make state persistence more reliable
  • Temporarily disable OpenStack ap-sa-2

New Contributors

  • @nkraetzschmar made their first contribution in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/pull/354
Full Changelog: https://github.com/gardenlinux/glci/compare/1.3.0...1.3.1

item.title: gardener/etcd-backup-restore - v0.42.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/etcd-backup-restore:v0.42.0]

⚠️ Breaking Changes

  • [OPERATOR] The --enable-etcd-member-gc and --k8s-member-gc-duration flags are removed along with the member GC feature due to a lack of use-cases. by @CaptainIRS [#999]

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • [OPERATOR] Fix the deadlock issue in snapshotter. by @ishan16696 [#971]
  • [OPERATOR] Memory leak issue has been fixed by ensuring the etcd watch client is properly closed. by @ishan16696 [#985]
  • [DEVELOPER] The make verify target was fixed so that it properly executes unit tests. by @plkokanov [#1002]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Upgrade etcd version to 3.5.27 by @Shreyas-s14 [#986]
  • [OPERATOR] added the next-cluster-version-compatible flag for embed etcd and helm chart by @Shreyas-s14 [#988]
  • [OPERATOR] export testresults as inlined ocm-resource by @heldkat [#981]
  • [OPERATOR] The copy operation now fetches the latest 4 full snapshots when checking if a final full snapshot is present. by @plkokanov [#1001]
  • [OPERATOR] Upgrade to golang:1.25.7 in build/Dockerfile by @Shreyas-s14 [#990]

Container (OCI) Images

  • etcdbrctl: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/etcdbrctl:v0.42.0

item.title: gardener/logging - v1.2.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/logging:v1.2.0]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Controller-runtime cache is now restricted to only watch Cluster objects and strips managed fields from cached resources, reducing memory usage and API server load. by @nickytd [#455]
  • [OPERATOR] Switched from the full github.com/gardener/gardener dependency to the minimal github.com/gardener/gardener/pkg/apis package. Replaced Gardener's extension controller ShootFromCluster with a local helper and the Gardener logger with the project's own pkg/log logger. Kubernetes libraries bumped to v0.35.1. by @nickytd [#454]
  • [DEVELOPER] Updated dependencies including golangci-lint and various Go tooling packages, addressed linter feedback with appropriate security annotations and style suppressions, and improved Makefile go fix command. by @nickytd [#451]
  • [DEVELOPER] Modernized codebase with go fix: replaced traditional for loops with range loops and added automated go fix validation to CI pipeline by @nickytd [#450]

item.title: openmcp-project/openmcp - Release v0.0.63
item.description:
openMCP

Components:

mcp-operator [v0.52.0]:

Changes included in v0.52.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Release v0.52.0 (#266, @robertgraeff)
  • - Support credentialsBindingName in shoot templates to allow a migration from secret bindings to credential bindings. (#264, @robertgraeff)
#### [USER]
  • - Release v0.51.0 (#263, @robertgraeff)

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Adjust validation of shoot templates, so that credentialsBindingName is supported instead of secretBindingName (#262, @robertgraeff)
---

openmcp-operator [v0.18.1]:

Changes included in v0.18.1:

Changelog

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [OPERATOR]
  • Fixed a bug that could lead to AccessRequests being stuck in deletion, because responsibility was with the generic controller, but that one ignored AccessRequests with a non-zero DeletionTimestamp. (#240, @Diaphteiros)

➕ Other

#### [DEVELOPER]
  • Added tests for the IsClusterProviderResponsibleForAccessRequest function. (#240, @Diaphteiros)
---

gitops-templates [v0.1.4]:

Changes included in v0.1.4:

🚀 Features

  • change env overlay branch variable to flux.gitrepo.ref.branch #14
- [OPERATOR][BREAKING] Changed gitrepo environment based variable for branch to git.pullBranch. ---

control-plane-operator [v0.1.19]:

Changes included in v0.1.19:

🐛 Fixes

  • configurable labels #124
- [DEVLOPER][BUGFIX] Allow label customization with FluxReconciler and ObjectReconciler ---

quota-operator [v0.16.0]:

Changes included in v0.16.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [USER]
  • (#142, @guewa)

What's Changed

  • chore(deps): update hack/common digest to 4159ec6 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/130
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/spf13/cobra to v1.10.2 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/132
  • chore(deps): update gcr.io/distroless/static-debian12:nonroot docker digest to 2b7c93f by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/133
  • chore(deps): update dependency go to v1.25.5 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/131
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.38.3 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/136
  • chore(deps): update hack/common digest to 6824b1f by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/134
  • chore(deps): update gcr.io/distroless/static-debian12:nonroot docker digest to cba10d7 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/141
  • chore(deps): update hack/common digest to 63dd575 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/138
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.39.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/140
  • fix(deps): update kubernetes packages to v0.35.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/137
  • fix(deps): update k8s.io/utils digest to 914a6e7 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/139
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.27.5 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/135
  • feat: release v0.16.0 by @guewa in https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/pull/142
Full Changelog: https://github.com/openmcp-project/quota-operator/compare/v0.15.0...v0.16.0 ---

project-workspace-operator [v1.3.0]:

Changes included in v1.3.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • Changes to the PWO config or to ServiceProviders will now take effect immediately without having to restart the PWO. (#174, @Diaphteiros)
#### [USER]
  • (#183, @rdksap)

➕ Other

#### [DEVELOPER]
  • The PWO now uses the discovery client instead of fetching CRDs to turn group/version/kind into group/version/resource. (#174, @Diaphteiros)
---

bootstrapper [v0.14.0]:

Changes included in v0.14.0:

Changelog

---

service-provider-landscaper [v0.15.0]:

Changes included in v0.15.0:

Changelog

---

service-provider-crossplane [v0.3.0]:

Changes included in v0.3.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • configure custom CA in ProviderConfig (#83, @ValentinGerlach)
---

cluster-provider-gardener [v0.11.0]:

Changes included in v0.11.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Release v0.11.0 of the cluster-provider-gardener (#181, @robertgraeff)

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Fix for the update of OpenIDConnect resources. (#180, @robertgraeff)

➕ Other

#### [H]
  • ginkgo --sem-ver-filter="2.1.1, redis=8.2.0" (#174, ⚙️)
---

cluster-provider-kind [v0.2.0]:

Changes included in v0.2.0:

🚀 Features

  • local registry config #120
- [USER][FEATURE] create clusters with custom kind configuration
  • apply requested token config permissions #112
- [USER][FEATURE] token based access processing

🐛 Fixes

  • multi-arch image loading #117
- [USER][BUGFIX] fix image loading to kind on arm64
  • improve error message on unsupported network #111
- [USER][FEATURE] improved error message for user on unsupported networks. ---

platform-service-dns [v0.0.5]:

Changes included in v0.0.5:

Changelog

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [USER]
  • Preserve unknown fields in PurposeSelectorRequirement (#66, @reshnm)
---

platform-service-gateway [v0.0.9]:

Changes included in v0.0.9:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Release v0.0.9 (#85, @robertgraeff)

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Fix for a missing logger. (#84, @robertgraeff)
---

platform-service-project-workspace [v1.3.0]:

Changes included in v1.3.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • Changes to the PWO config or to ServiceProviders will now take effect immediately without having to restart the PWO. (#174, @Diaphteiros)
#### [USER]

➕ Other

#### [DEVELOPER]
  • The PWO now uses the discovery client instead of fetching CRDs to turn group/version/kind into group/version/resource. (#174, @Diaphteiros)
---

#### [OPERATOR]
  • - Release v0.0.16 (#14, @robertgraeff)

What's Changed

  • chore: Configure Renovate by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/usage-operator/pull/3
  • chore(deps): update module github.com/openmcp-project/project-workspace-operator/api to v0.19.0 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/usage-operator/pull/4

item.title: openmcp-project/ui-frontend - v0.5.7
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Integrate Sentry with the error boundary [#258] by @lucasgoral in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/434
  • fix(deps): update @ui5/webcomponents packages by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/389
  • chore(deps): update node.js to a81a03d by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/428
  • chore(deps): update gcr.io/distroless/nodejs24-debian12 docker digest to aad62f8 by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/430
  • chore(deps): bump @isaacs/brace-expansion from 5.0.0 to 5.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/421
  • chore(deps): bump qs from 6.14.1 to 6.14.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/429
  • chore(deps): bump systeminformation from 5.30.7 to 5.31.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/436
  • chore(deps-dev): bump ajv from 6.12.6 to 6.14.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/440
  • refactor(auth): move token refresh from proxy to client-side by @andreaskienle in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/438
  • Added simple feature toggle and a variable to mark MCP v1 as deprecated by @lucasgoral in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/439
  • docs: add EU funded by logo by @maximiliantech in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/452
  • feat(auth): implement proactive client-side token refresh by @andreaskienle in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/450

New Contributors

  • @maximiliantech made their first contribution in https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/pull/452
Full Changelog: https://github.com/openmcp-project/ui-frontend/compare/v0.5.6...v0.5.7

item.description:
Changes included in v0.2.0:

🚀 Features

- [USER][FEATURE] create clusters with custom kind configuration
  • apply requested token config permissions #112
- [USER][FEATURE] token based access processing

🐛 Fixes

  • multi-arch image loading #117
- [USER][BUGFIX] fix image loading to kind on arm64
  • improve error message on unsupported network #111
- [USER][FEATURE] improved error message for user on unsupported networks.

item.title: ironcore-dev/cloud-provider-metal - v0.2.0
item.description:
Changes

🚀 Features

  • Enhance node controller to assign pod prefix to node object @maxmoehl (#149)
  • Use SystemUUID instead of deprecated UUID in the Server spec @hardikdr (#145)
  • Add node controller @Nuckal777 (#144)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Enhance node controller to assign pod prefix to node object @maxmoehl (#149)

🧰 Maintenance

  • Create release branches for minor versions @afritzler (#159)
  • Bump github.com/ironcore-dev/metal-operator from 0.2.1 to 0.3.0 in the go-dependencies group @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#156)

  • Bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.27.4 to 2.27.5 in the go-dependencies group @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#148)

item.title: ironcore-dev/metal-operator - v0.4.0
item.description:
Changes

⚠️ Breaking

  • Remove deprecated uuid field from ServerSpec @afritzler (#699)

🚀 Features

  • Reconcile Set types until all patching/creation is completed @nagadeesh-nagaraja (#676)
  • Remove deprecated uuid field from ServerSpec @afritzler (#699)
  • Add DNSRecord template volume to Helm chart @stefanhipfel (#660)
  • Update gofish dependency and adjust for changes @stmcginnis (#644)
  • Add priority field to ServerMaintenance for ordering maintenance tasks @stefanhipfel (#687)
  • Add short names to metal resources @afritzler (#679)
  • Kubebuilder update from v4.11.1 to v4.12.0 @afritzler (#686)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Ensure ServerMaintenance is removed when performing a BMC version upgrade @stefanhipfel (#712)
  • Bump gofish to v0.21.4 @xkonni (#717)
  • Fix percentage display in BMC/BIOS update conditions @xkonni (#711)
  • Fix flaky BMCVersion/BIOSVersion tests due to nil UpgradeTask pointer @afritzler (#703)
  • Refactor BIOSSettings and BMCSettings with condition-based state tracking @nagadeesh-nagaraja (#653)

🧰 Maintenance

  • Bump go.opentelemetry.io/otel/sdk from 1.38.0 to 1.40.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#716)
  • Bump rollup from 4.42.0 to 4.59.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#715)
  • Bump lodash-es and mermaid @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#702)
  • Bump github.com/stmcginnis/gofish from 0.21.1 to 0.21.3 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#701)
  • Fix release drafter to support drafting patch releases on release branches @afritzler (#698)
  • Set correct branch for releases @afritzler (#697)
  • Add CLAUDE.md to point to AGENTS.md @afritzler (#694)
  • Bump github.com/jaypipes/ghw from 0.22.0 to 0.23.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#682)
  • Bump golang from 1.25.7 to 1.26.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#681)
  • Collaps concepts section in docs @afritzler (#677)

item.title: gardener/external-dns-management - v0.36.1
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/external-dns-management:v0.36.1]

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • [OPERATOR] The dnsprovider-replication controller no longer replicates DNSProvider objects that carry a foreign dns.gardener.cloud/class annotation. Previously, such providers were copied to the target cluster and then instantly deleted, leading to avoidable processing. by @MartinWeindel [#812]

item.title: gardener/gardener-extension-networking-calico - v1.57.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-networking-calico:v1.57.0]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] The .spec.trafficDistribution field of the topology-aware Services will be automatically switched from the deprecated PreferClose to the new PreferSameZone option for Kubernetes 1.34+. by @Kostov6 [#786]
  • [OPERATOR] Hard resource limits have been removed. Resources will be managed by various available autoscalers. by @domdom82 [#792]
  • [OPERATOR] Added validation to restrict calico-ipam to IPv4 single-stack shoots only by @axel7born [#796]
  • [OPERATOR] A bug has been resolved that prevented the correct configuration of the default IP Pool for IPv6. by @axel7born [#795]
  • [OPERATOR] Added SeamlessOverlaySwitch feature gate (alpha) to prevent network disruption when switching Calico from overlay (IPIP) to non-overlay mode. When enabled, the extension validates that cloud provider routes are created on all nodes before disabling overlay networking, ensuring zero-downtime network transitions. The feature gate is disabled by default and can be enabled via the controller configuration. by @DockToFuture [#779]

Helm Charts

  • admission-calico-application: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/charts/gardener/extensions/admission-calico-application:v1.57.0
  • admission-calico-runtime: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/charts/gardener/extensions/admission-calico-runtime:v1.57.0

item.title: gardener/dependency-watchdog - v1.7.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/dependency-watchdog:v1.7.0]

✨ New Features

  • [OPERATOR] The prober does not consider nodes undergoing in-place update. Concretely, nodes with InPlaceUpdate condition with reasons ReadyForUpdate or UpdateFailed. by @shafeeqes [#180]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Updated golang to 1.25.7 and gardener to 1.136.2 by @ashwani2k [#184]

Container (OCI) Images

  • dependency-watchdog: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/dependency-watchdog:v1.7.0

item.title: cobaltcore-dev/labels-injector - v1.0
item.description:
What's Changed

  • switch to go-makefile-maker, reconcile all pods on startup by @notandy in https://github.com/cobaltcore-dev/labels-injector/pull/2
  • Tag images also with git-sha by @fwiesel in https://github.com/cobaltcore-dev/labels-injector/pull/7
  • Renovate: Update External dependencies by @renovate[bot] in https://github.com/cobaltcore-dev/labels-injector/pull/8
  • reconcile all pods in a loop around every 5 min by @notandy in https://github.com/cobaltcore-dev/labels-injector/pull/9
Full Changelog: https://github.com/cobaltcore-dev/labels-injector/commits/v1.0

item.title: gardener/etcd-druid - unnamed-release
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/etcd-druid:v0.35.1]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Added next-cluster-version-compatible CLI flag to the Etcd configMap template to ensure version compatibility during etcd upgrades or downgrades. by @Shreyas-s14 [#1293]
  • [OPERATOR] Upgrade to golang:1.25.7 in build/Dockerfile by @Shreyas-s14 [#1292]

[github.com/gardener/etcd-wrapper:v0.6.2]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Update to Go:1.25.7 in Dockerfile. by @ishan16696 [#83]

[github.com/gardener/etcd-backup-restore:v0.41.1]

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • [OPERATOR] Fix the deadlock issue in snapshotter. by @ishan16696 [#984]
  • [OPERATOR] Memory leak issue has been fixed by ensuring the etcd watch client is properly closed. by @ishan16696 [#987]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Upgrade to golang:1.25.7 in build/Dockerfile by @Shreyas-s14 [#997]
  • [OPERATOR] Added the next-cluster-version-compatible flag to embed etcd and helm chart for version compatibility of etcd. by @Shreyas-s14 [#998]

item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-shoot-rsyslog-relp:v0.12.0]

📰 Noteworthy

  • [USER] Rsyslog will send logs when node time has changed by @Kostov6 [#365]

  • [OPERATOR] The .spec.trafficDistribution field of the topology-aware Services will be automatically switched from the deprecated PreferClose to the new PreferSameZone option for Kubernetes 1.34+. by @Kostov6 [#377]

item.title: openmcp-project/metrics-operator - Release v0.10.0
item.description:
Changes included in v0.10.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [USER]
  • Support multiple projections for FederatedMetrics (#166, @reshnm)
  • Support for projection default values (#167, @reshnm)
  • Ensure unique cluster name for remote cluster access (#164, @reshnm)

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [OPERATOR]
  • Add missing rbac rules in Helm values (#165, @reshnm)
#### [USER]
  • Derive metric name from spec.Name instead of metadata.Name (#168, @reshnm)
  • Disable webhook configurations (#158, @reshnm)

item.title: cloudoperators/juno - @cloudoperators/juno-ui-components@6.1.1
item.description:
Patch Changes

  • aff8f05: Improve component descriptions and prop documentation in the editor for better developer experience
  • 6b26feb: fix(ui): Badge - inline-flex is now always applied by default. Previously this was only done in case of using Badge with icon. This change leads to consistent rendering with and without icon.

item.title: openmcp-project/project-workspace-operator - Release v1.3.0
item.description:
Changes included in v1.3.0:

Changelog

🚀 Features

#### [OPERATOR]
  • Changes to the PWO config or to ServiceProviders will now take effect immediately without having to restart the PWO. (#174, @Diaphteiros)
#### [USER]
  • (#183, @rdksap)

➕ Other

#### [DEVELOPER]
  • The PWO now uses the discovery client instead of fetching CRDs to turn group/version/kind into group/version/resource. (#174, @Diaphteiros)

item.title: gardener/gardener-extension-shoot-lakom-service - v0.24.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-shoot-lakom-service:v0.24.0]

⚠️ Breaking Changes

  • [DEVELOPER] The GOARCH makefile variable has been replaced by TARGET_PLATFORM. by @vpnachev [#266]

✨ New Features

  • [DEVELOPER] Gardener extension shoot-lakom-service container images now can be built for multiple platforms locally via the variable TARGET_PLATFORMS, e.g. make docker-images TARGET_PLATFORMS=linux/amd64,linux/arm64. If the variable is unset, the container images are built for the platform linux/<host-arch> only. by @vpnachev [#266]

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • [DEVELOPER] Fixed the Helm chart image mapping attribute reference for the lakom chart by @8R0WNI3 [#244]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Lakom components are now built with Go 1.26.0 by @dependabot[bot] [#263]
  • [OPERATOR] The .spec.trafficDistribution field of the topology-aware Services of the shoot-lakom-admission component will be automatically switched from the deprecated PreferClose to the new PreferSameZone option for Kubernetes 1.34+. by @Kostov6 [#264]
  • [OPERATOR] Lakom components are now built with Go 1.25.5 by @dependabot[bot] [#239]
  • [DEVELOPER] Updated local setup to use new registry domain registry.local.gardener.cloud. by @rrhubenov [#245]

item.title: gardener/gardener-extension-registry-cache - v0.20.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-registry-cache:v0.20.0]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Add missing securityContext fields to the registry-cache extension components in order to comply with the restricted Pod Security Standards policy. by @mstueer [#473]
  • [OPERATOR] The .spec.trafficDistribution field of the topology-aware Services will be automatically switched from the deprecated PreferClose to the new PreferSameZone option for Kubernetes 1.34+. by @Kostov6 [#531]
  • [OPERATOR] The registry image is now referred by digest instead of tag. The upstream image docker.io/library/registry (and later on europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/3rd/registry) is (by design) rebuilt frequently. by @ialidzhikov [#523]
  • [DEVELOPER] The base image of registry-cache components is updated to gcr.io/distroless/static-debian13:nonroot. by @ialidzhikov [#505]

item.title: cloudoperators/greenhouse - v0.10.0
item.description:
🚀What's Changed

  • fix(charts): update appVersions by @IvoGoman in: #1725
  • chore(actions): additional dep groupings with renovate by @IvoGoman in: #1726
  • fix(tests): flaky kubeconfig_controller test by @IvoGoman in: #1730
  • fix(catalogs): use eventually scoped gomega by @IvoGoman in: #1731
  • feat(ci): add action to label PRs by size by @IvoGoman in: #1734
  • fix(catalogs): retain catalog secret err in status by @abhijith-darshan in: #1596
  • fix(e2e): update e2e workflow by @abhijith-darshan in: #1739
  • feat(greenhouse): ensure suspended conditions in lifecycle by @abhijith-darshan in: #1738
  • feat(ISSUE-1434): poc authorizer webhook for resource owners by @Zaggy21 in: #1695
  • fix(docs): update links in metadata templating by @IvoGoman in: #1736
  • feat(catalogs): catalog propagate owned-by label to (Cluster)PluginDefinitions by @abhijith-darshan in: #1753
  • feat(dev-env): enable flux and expression features by @IvoGoman in: #1757
  • fix(plugins): error not reported in plugin by @Zaggy21 in: #1755
  • fix(ci): group onsi & golang.org/x pkgs disregarding version bump by @IvoGoman in: #1762
  • fix(ci): use pinGitHubActionDigestsToSemver by @IvoGoman in: #1767
  • feat(e2e): replace bitnamicharts nginx with podinfo chart in e2e by @Zaggy21 in: #1772
  • fix(plugins): set an empty .spec.test on HelmRelease by @IvoGoman in: #1778
  • feat(plugindefinitions): apply flux HelmChart resource to validate helm chart in registry by @abhijith-darshan in: #1752
  • feat(greenhouse): adds local registry sample by @abhijith-darshan in: #1343
  • fix(plugins): sort mirrored images to avoid controllerutil diff by @abhijith-darshan in: #1780
  • fix(pluginpresets): recreate Plugin when deleted by @Zaggy21 in: #1768
  • chore(greenhouse): separate authz commands from root Makefile by @abhijith-darshan in: #1779
  • fix(tests): flaky organization dex test by @Zaggy21 in: #1788
  • feat(docs): introduce playbooks for all existing alerts by @uwe-mayer in: #1707
  • chore(deps): bump dexidp by @IvoGoman in: #1786
  • fix(docs): introduce playbook landing pages by @uwe-mayer in: #1793
  • chore(deps): update golang docker tag to v1.25.5 and dexidp by @Zaggy21 in: #1794
  • fix(plugins): set error condition if PluginDefinitions helmrepo not found by @IvoGoman in: #1785
  • fix(plugindefinitions): only enqueue if not deleted and generation changed by @IvoGoman in: #1799
  • feat(plugins): use helm chart ref in plugin helm release by @abhijith-darshan in: #1800

📦 Dependency updates

  • fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.38.3 by @renovate[bot] in: #1727
  • chore(config): migrate Renovate config - autoclosed by @renovate[bot] in: #1729
  • fix(deps): update golang.org/x/exp digest to 716be56 by @renovate[bot] in: #1720
  • chore(deps): update pascalgn/size-label-action digest to 6ec5bd0 by @renovate[bot] in: #1735
  • chore(deps): update github actions updates by @renovate[bot] in: #1763
  • chore(deps): update actions/checkout action to v6.0.2 by @renovate[bot] in: #1749
  • chore(deps): update github actions updates (minor) by @renovate[bot] in: #1770
  • chore(deps): update github actions updates (patch) by @renovate[bot] in: #1769
  • fix(deps): update kubernetes packages (minor) by @renovate[bot] in: #1700
  • fix(deps): update k8s.io/utils digest to 914a6e7 by @renovate[bot] in: #1702
  • fix(deps): update flux packages (minor) by @renovate[bot] in: #1742
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.27.5 by @renovate[bot] in: #1746
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/gomega to v1.39.0 by @renovate[bot] in: #1747
  • fix(deps): update module helm.sh/helm/v3 to v3.20.0 by @renovate[bot] in: #1756
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/google/cel-go to v0.27.0 by @renovate[bot] in: #1783
  • fix(deps): update module github.com/google/go-github/v80 to v82 by @renovate[bot] in: #1784
  • fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/oauth2 to v0.35.0 by @renovate[bot] in: #1791
  • chore(deps): update github actions updates (minor) by @renovate[bot] in: #1782
  • chore(deps): update controller-tools (makefile) (minor) by @renovate[bot] in: #1728
  • chore(deps): update dependency kubernetes-sigs/kustomize to v5.8.1 by @renovate[bot] in: #1789
  • chore(deps): update golang docker tag to v1.25.7 by @renovate[bot] in: #1796
  • chore(deps): update github actions updates (patch) by @renovate[bot] in: #1790

item.title: gardener/gardener-extension-shoot-oidc-service - v0.36.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-shoot-oidc-service:v0.36.0]

⚠️ Breaking Changes

  • [OPERATOR] References to the health check controller and its configuration have been removed, as they are no longer needed. Additionally, the unused OIDC service configuration API and its related files have been removed. by @theoddora [#404]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] The OIDC service is enabled to work with the garden control plane by supporting the garden extension class alongside the existing shoot class. by @theoddora [#412]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] The extension is now built using go version 1.25.7. by @dependabot[bot] [#421]

[github.com/gardener/oidc-webhook-authenticator:v0.41.0]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] OWA is now built using go version 1.25.6. by @dependabot[bot] [#215]

item.title: cloudoperators/repo-guard - 1.6.0
item.description:
Repo Guard 1.6.0 — Release Notes

✨ Features

Verified domain email enforcement

  • Introduces a verified-domain email check for GitHub users.
  • Controlled via labels on GithubTeams and GithubAccountLink.
  • Ensures only users with verified emails from approved domains can be reconciled.
  • Issue: #20

Metrics and alerting

  • Adds metrics for:
- GitHub organizations, teams, repositories, and external providers - Team and repository add/remove operations - Organization owner operations - Failed and notfound operations
  • Includes alert rules based on these metrics.
  • Issue: #16

GitHub rate-limit handling

  • Detects GitHub secondary rate-limit responses (e.g. HTTP 403 with retry timestamp).
  • Pauses reconciliation on the Github custom resource until the limit resets.
  • Issue: #5

CI/CD with GitHub Actions

  • Adds GitHub Actions workflows to:
- Run tests on pull requests and the main branch - Build and publish Docker images on tagged releases
  • Issue: #4
---

🐛 Bug Fixes

Safer organization owner reconciliation

  • Organization reconciler now waits until referenced GithubTeams are in Ready state
before calculating organization owner operations.
  • Prevents invalid or premature owner changes.
  • Issue: #18

Cleanup for notfound team member operations

  • Adds clean-up logic for team member operations stuck in notfound
(e.g. users who have not yet logged into GitHub).
  • Prevents reconciliation from stalling indefinitely.
  • Issue: #9

Organization status size reduction

  • Fixes excessive growth of Organization status objects when managing many
repositories and teams.
  • Prevents etcd object size limit issues.
  • Issue: #8
---

📋 Included Issues

  • #20 — Verified Email Checker for GithubAccountLink
  • #16 — Metrics and alerts
  • #5 — Rate limiting
  • #4 — GitHub Actions for test and release
  • #18 — Org reconciler waits for teams to be Ready
  • #9 — Clean operations for notfound team members
  • #8 — Organization status overflow
---

item.title: platform-mesh/ocm - 0.2.0
item.description:
Platform Mesh 0.2.0

This release of Platform Mesh includes updates to multiple components.

Summary

This release includes 17 component update(s), including breaking changes 🔥.

Contributors

Thank you to all the contributors who made this release possible: <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/97069709?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="OlegErshov" title="OlegErshov">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/117839500?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="Sobyt483" title="Sobyt483">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/42006873?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="aaronschweig" title="aaronschweig">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/211480?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="akafazov" title="akafazov">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/7794387?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="gkrajniak" title="gkrajniak">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/15053826?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="makdeniss" title="makdeniss">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/3225744?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="mjudeikis" title="mjudeikis">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/52737?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="nexus49" title="nexus49">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10514301?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="ntnn" title="ntnn">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/253026766?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="philtk79" title="philtk79">  <img src="https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/11369081?v=4" width="50" height="50" alt="simontesar" title="simontesar">   _11 contributor(s)_

Key Changes

  • kubernetes-graphql-gateway: 🔥 (breaking) Feature: Improved Subscription handling to align with Kubernetes WATCH API by adding an Event Envelope. (#105 by @makdeniss)
  • kubernetes-graphql-gateway: 🔥 (breaking) Feature: Plural queries return an object with resourceVersion, continue, remainingItemCount, and items, replacing the previous bare array of items. (#112 by @makdeniss)
  • kubernetes-graphql-gateway: 🔥 (breaking) Feature: Queries/Mutations grouped by API group and version (e.g., core { v1 { ... } }, non-core groups use underscores). Legacy flat query/mutation names removed. Subscriptions renamed to flat versioned fields (e.g., core_v1_configmaps, core_v1_configmap). Old unversioned names removed; (#113 by @makdeniss)
  • kubernetes-graphql-gateway: 🔥 (breaking) Queries/Mutations: Path changed from core { v1 { ... } } to v1 { ... }. Update client queries accordingly. Subscriptions: Renamed from core_v1_<resource> to v1_<resource> (e.g., core_v1_configmaps → v1_configmaps) (#114 by @makdeniss)
  • kubernetes-graphql-gateway: 🔥 (breaking) Feature: Grouped mutation fields into hierarchical objects by Group and Version. (#122 by @makdeniss)
  • platform-mesh-operator: 🎉 Feature: Added account in accounts content configuration to enable the Feature to created Child Accounts of Accounts to build up a Account Tree. (#226 by @Sobyt483)
  • platform-mesh-operator: 🔥 (breaking) Update defineEntity Id core_namespace -> namespace and remove core group from resourceDefinition and graphqlEntity because there's no longer any core group. Existing UI definitions would need to update their entity if core_namespace was used. (#303 by @Sobyt483)
  • security-operator: 🎉 Feature: Removed Cross-plane dependency for managing new keycloak realms by adding support for a IdentityProviderConfiguration resource (#200 by @OlegErshov)
  • security-operator: 🎉 Feature: Support for setting a default user password - enabling user onboarding in local-setup without emails. (#282 by @makdeniss)

Component Changes

Platform Mesh Components

#### keycloak: 25.2.3 → 26.5.2 🔥 | Resource | Version | Links | |----------|---------|-------| | 📦 Helm Chart | 25.3.0 | Package • Source | | 🐳 Container Image | 26.5.2-debian-12-r0 | Package | 🐳 postgresql Image | 17.6.0-debian-12-r4 | Release | OCM Component Descriptor: ``bash ocm get cv github.com/platform-mesh/keycloak:26.5.2 --repo ghcr.io/platform-mesh -o yaml ` #### account-operator: 0.10.13 → 0.14.7 | Resource | Version | Links | |----------|---------|-------| | 📦 Helm Chart | 0.14.7 | Package • Source | | 🐳 Container Image | v0.9.3 | Package • Release | OCM Component Descriptor: `bash ocm get cv github.com/platform-mesh/account-operator:0.14.7 --repo ghcr.io/platform-mesh -o yaml ` <details> <summary>All Pull Requests (9)</summary>
  • #100: feat: removed auth configuration reference by @OlegErshov
  • #115: feat: use TARGETARCH to support cross-platform multi-arch builds by @simontesar
  • #121: Feat/mcr mcp update by @simontesar
  • #122: feat: improve retry behavior with static-then-exponential rate limiter by @nexus49
  • #126: feat: introduced oidc section in account info resouce spec by @OlegErshov
  • #128: fix: preserve AuthenticationConfigurations when updating WorkspaceType by @nexus49
  • #129: Fix/flaky integration test by @simontesar
  • #130: fix: oidc info retrieval from parent account info by @OlegErshov

_Note: 30 renovate bot PR(s) omitted for brevity._ </details> #### example-httpbin-operator: 0.5.1 → 0.5.9 | Resource | Version | Links | |----------|---------|-------| | 📦 Helm Chart | 0.5.9 | Package • Source | | 🐳 Container Image | v0.5.1 | Package • Release | OCM Component Descriptor: `bash ocm get cv github.com/platform-mesh/example-httpbin-operator:0.5.9 --repo ghcr.io/platform-mesh -o yaml ` #### extension-manager-operator: 0.31.137 → 0.34.44 | Resource | Version | Links | |----------|---------|-------| | 📦 Helm Chart | 0.34.44 | Package • Source | | 🐳 Container Image | v0.4.159 | Package • Release | OCM Component Descriptor: `bash ocm get cv github.com/platform-mesh/extension-manager-operator:0.34.44 --repo ghcr.io/platform-mesh -o yaml ` <details> <summary>All Pull Requests (2)</summary>

item.title: gardener/machine-controller-manager-provider-openstack - v0.25.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/machine-controller-manager-provider-openstack:v0.25.0]

✨ New Features

  • [OPERATOR] To support dual-stack networking, multiple subnets can be configured.
The field SubnetID in MachineProviderConfigSpec is now deprecated. Please use SubnetIDs instead. Support for SubnetID will be removed in a future release. by @axel7born [#347]
  • [DEVELOPER] When calling CreateMachine() the method now returns the internal IPs of the server in the Addresses field. by @jamand [#322]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Flavor name not found errors will be treated as ResourceExhausted errors and be backed off by @ririko-nakamura [#350]
  • [OPERATOR] Fix pull request handling for PRs of fork owners outside of the gardener organisation by @hebelsan [#342]
  • [DEVELOPER] Resolve minor linting issue by @jamand [#336]

Container (OCI) Images

  • machine-controller-manager-provider-openstack: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/machine-controller-manager-provider-openstack:v0.25.0

item.title: gardener/gardener-landscape-kit - v0.1.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardener-landscape-kit:v0.1.0]

📰 Noteworthy

  • [OPERATOR] Provide patch updates to the default dependency vector in release branches at componentsvector/components.yaml. by @LucaBernstein [#61]
  • [OPERATOR] The base and landscape paths provided via configuration must be relative from the landscape repository root. by @LucaBernstein [#47]
  • [DEVELOPER] Add Renovate for automatic dependency updates. by @LucaBernstein [#10]

✨ New Features

  • [OPERATOR] Add provider-aws extension component. by @LucaBernstein [#79]
  • [OPERATOR] Add the garden component. by @LucaBernstein [#43]
  • [OPERATOR] Add gardenlinux and suse-chost os extensions as components. by @LucaBernstein [#80]
  • [OPERATOR] Add the gardener-operator component. by @LucaBernstein [#36]
  • [OPERATOR] Add option to download latest default components vector from release branch. by @LucaBernstein [#62]
  • [OPERATOR] Add support for multiple manifests per YAML file. by @LucaBernstein [#3]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] Write component vector into ocm-components.yaml in resolve-ocm-components command. by @MartinWeindel [#60]
  • [OPERATOR] Submodules are supported out-of-the-box. by @LucaBernstein [#47]
  • [OPERATOR] Keep left aligned comments on merging. by @MartinWeindel [#45]
  • [USER] The order of sequence items is preserved from the current manifest. by @LucaBernstein [#37]
  • [DEVELOPER] Add OCM testdata generator by @MartinWeindel [#4]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- codeberg.org/forgejo/forgejo from 14.0.1 to 14.0.2. by @gardener-ci-robot [#78]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- kindest/node from v1.34.0 to v1.34.3. by @gardener-ci-robot [#70]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- github.com/spf13/cobra from v1.10.1 to v1.10.2. by @gardener-ci-robot [#26]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- sigs.k8s.io/kustomize/api from v0.20.1 to v0.21.0. by @gardener-ci-robot [#30]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- github.com/gardener/gardener-extension-provider-aws from v1.67.0 to v1.67.2. Release Notes by @gardener-ci-robot [#81]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- k8s.io/utils from v0.0.0-20251222190033-383b50a9004e to v0.0.0-20251222233032-718f0e51e6d2. by @gardener-ci-robot [#42]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:
- github.com/fluxcd/source-controller/api from v1.7.3 to v1.7.4. by @gardener-ci-robot [#25]
  • [DEPENDENCY] The following dependencies have been updated:

item.title: openmcp-project/openmcp-operator - Release v0.18.1
item.description:
Changes included in v0.18.1:

Changelog

🐛 Bugfixes

#### [OPERATOR]
  • Fixed a bug that could lead to AccessRequests being stuck in deletion, because responsibility was with the generic controller, but that one ignored AccessRequests with a non-zero DeletionTimestamp. (#240, @Diaphteiros)

➕ Other

#### [DEVELOPER]
  • Added tests for the IsClusterProviderResponsibleForAccessRequest function. (#240, @Diaphteiros)

item.title: gardener/aws-custom-route-controller - v0.15.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/aws-custom-route-controller:v0.15.0]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] Enhance aws-custom-route-controller to properly manage Kubernetes node NetworkUnavailable conditions based on route creation status. by @DockToFuture [#411]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] The base image is updated to gcr.io/distroless/static-debian13:nonroot. by @MartinWeindel [#391]

Container (OCI) Images

  • aws-custom-route-controller: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/aws-custom-route-controller:v0.15.0

item.title: open-resource-discovery/specification - v1.14.0
item.description:
Added

  • Added Agent as a new top-level entity type in ORD
- Agents provide high-level descriptions of systems that can perform tasks, make decisions, and interact with users or other systems to achieve specific business goals. This may be an AI agent or a rule-based agent. - Agents have exposedApiResources to describe their API interface, e.g. using the A2A protocol. - Agents have integrationDependencies to describe which external resources like APIs, MCP Servers etc. they depend on. - Added AI Agents and Protocols concept documentation
  • Introduced abstract property for API, Event and Data Product Resources to indicate interface-only resources.
  • Added subset property to ApiResourceIntegrationAspect with new ApiResourceIntegrationAspectSubset definition
- This allows narrowing down API resource integration aspects to specific operations or tools - The operationId field can be used to specify individual API operations (e.g., OpenAPI operationId) or tools (e.g., MCP tool name)
  • Added labels and correlationIds to group and group type.
- This allows to apply extensions / references to non ORD concepts via IDs, making the group concept more extensible.

Fixed

  • BREAKING FIX: make compatibleWith an array of ORD IDs and a maximum version instead of an ORD ID value. Only this way one can correctly express compatibility with a dedicated contract versions.
- We're introducing this as a fix, because the feature has not been adopted so far and we think that the information missing otherwise would make the concept unviable for real scenarios.

What's Changed

  • preserve x-ums-type property in the configuration and document schema by @maiargu in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/64
  • Enable trusted publishing channel to NPM registry by @pavelkornev in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/65
  • Adding (AI) Agents as Top-Level Concept by @HelgeCD in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/59
  • feat(spec): add abstract property and enhance compatibleWith definition by @swennemers in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/30
  • Add labels and correlationIDs to group and group type by @Fannon in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/36
  • Add API Resource Integration Aspect Subset by @Fannon in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/66
  • Release ORD v1.14.0 by @Fannon in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/67

New Contributors

  • @HelgeCD made their first contribution in https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/pull/59
Full Changelog: https://github.com/open-resource-discovery/specification/compare/v1.13.0...v1.14.0

item.title: gardener/cert-management - v0.20.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/cert-management:v0.20.0]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] Support PKCS#8 encoding of certificate private key. For Certificate objects, set .spec.privateKey.encoding to PKCS8. For source objects like Ingress and Service, set the annotation cert.gardener.cloud/private-key-encoding=PKCS8. by @MartinWeindel [#638]

🏃 Others

  • [OPERATOR] The base image is updated to gcr.io/distroless/static-debian13:nonroot. by @MartinWeindel [#633]

Helm Charts

  • cert-controller-manager: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/charts/cert-controller-manager:v0.20.0

Container (OCI) Images

  • cert-management: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/cert-controller-manager:v0.20.0

item.title: ironcore-dev/machine-controller-manager-provider-ironcore-metal - v0.1.0
item.description:
Changes

🚀 Features

  • Logs if created machine node name already present in cluster @videlov (#129)
  • Split CreateMachine functionality and implement InitializeMachine, plus some refactoring @videlov (#117)
  • Bump k8s.io/* deps to v1.33 @afritzler (#116)
  • Consider claim power setting for machine status @Nuckal777 (#114)
  • Split ServerClaim creation and waiting @defo89 (#111)
  • Fix setting IPAddressClaim ownerref @defo89 (#110)
  • Add BMCName node name policy @Nuckal777 (#109)
  • Add optional Server loopback address to metadata @afritzler (#105)
  • Allow to use Server.Name as the Node name of a Machine @afritzler (#103)
  • Add polling of server claim before setting its ownership to ips @SzymonSAP (#93)
  • Refactor IP address claim labels to use separate name and namespace keys @SzymonSAP (#92)
  • Add OwnerReference to ipAddressClaims @SzymonSAP (#88)
  • Remove CSIDriverName @afritzler (#82)
  • Bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 6 to 7 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#81)
  • Remove support for ironcore ipam @Nuckal777 (#80)
  • Allow multiple IPAM configs for CAPI @SzymonSAP (#75)
  • Bump k8s.io/* to v0.32 @afritzler (#46)
  • Use k8s atomic writer to test client provider @SzymonSAP (#67)
  • Ignore NoMatchError on IP deletion @Nuckal777 (#69)
  • Set logger for the controller runtime @SzymonSAP (#66)
  • Check target file changes in client provider @SzymonSAP (#65)
  • Add prefix and gateway to capi ipam metadata @defo89 (#62)
  • Fix klog version @SzymonSAP (#60)
  • Add logs to client provider @SzymonSAP (#59)
  • Fix IPAddressClaim PoolRef kind @SzymonSAP (#55)
  • Add support for capi ipam @SzymonSAP (#50)
  • Reload metal-kubeconfig @Nuckal777 (#44)
  • Exit wait context if there is no IP object @defo89 (#54)
  • Wait always for IP address to become ready @Nuckal777 (#53)
  • fix ProviderName @defo89 (#47)
  • Add metadata and ipamConfig to worker configuration @defo89 (#39)
  • Rename to ironcore-metal @Nuckal777 (#45)
  • Fix lint issue in docker file and error messages @ushabelgur (#19)
  • Fix ingition secret name length issue @ushabelgur (#18)
  • Change Ignition secret key name to key name to ignition @defo89 (#9)
  • Pass serverLabels from MachineClass to ServerClaim @Nuckal777 (#5)
  • Add initial MCM implementation for metal @afritzler (#2)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fix setting IPAddressClaim ownerref @defo89 (#110)
  • Add prefix and gateway to capi ipam metadata @defo89 (#62)
  • Fix klog version @SzymonSAP (#60)
  • fix ProviderName @defo89 (#47)
  • Fix lint issue in docker file and error messages @ushabelgur (#19)
  • Fix ingition secret name length issue @ushabelgur (#18)
  • Change Ignition secret key name to key name to ignition @defo89 (#9)

🧰 Maintenance

  • Bump github.com/coreos/butane from 0.25.1 to 0.26.0 in the go-dependencies group @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#164)
  • Bump the go-dependencies group across 1 directory with 2 updates @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#162)
  • Update ginkgo and golangci-lint @Nuckal777 (#161)

  • Bump golang from 1.25.4 to 1.25.5 in the docker-dependencies group @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#157)
  • Bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.42.0 to 0.45.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#156)

item.title: ironcore-dev/cluster-api-provider-ironcore-metal - v0.2.0
item.description:
Changes

🚀 Features

  • Add cluster.clusterNetwork to configure APIServerPort @defo89 (#87)
  • Add polling of server claim before setting its ownership to ips @SzymonSAP (#85)
  • Refactor IP address claim labels to use separate name and namespace keys @SzymonSAP (#84)
  • Add owner reference to ipAddressClaims @SzymonSAP (#81)
  • Bump k8s.io/* to v0.32.3 @afritzler (#83)
  • Set OwnerReference to IPAddress @defo89 (#77)
  • Add capi ipam support @SzymonSAP (#67)
  • Rename project to cluster-api-provider-ironcore-metal @hardikdr (#57)
  • Resolve conflicts for CAPI version 1.9.4 upgrade @hardikdr (#55)
  • Bump k8s.io/* deps to v0.31.1 @afritzler (#35)
  • Support setting node Hostname to match Serverclaim name @defo89 (#29)
  • Support ServerSelectors for MetalMachine @hardikdr (#28)
  • Allow Configuring Image for MetalMachines @defo89 (#19)
  • Change dev setup to use Ignition for KubeadmControlPlane @defo89 (#13)
  • Add metal-operator in tilt @defo89 (#12)
  • Implement ServerClaim-handling in MetalMachine Controller @hardikdr (#9)
  • Implement MetalMachine Controller @defo89 (#7)
  • Add Readme @hardikdr (#8)
  • Setup Github Workflows and Automation @defo89 (#2)
  • Fix linters, code-gen and Reuse @hardikdr (#4)
  • Initialize APIs and Controllers with Kubebuilder @defo89 (#3)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • make metaData compliant with Ignition 2.x spec @defo89 (#76)
  • add securityContext to the controller @defo89 (#71)
  • Resolve conflicts for CAPI version 1.9.4 upgrade @hardikdr (#55)
  • Fix ProviderID @hardikdr (#23)

  • Handle Unbound ServerClaims @hardikdr (#15)
  • Fix Docker Build @hardikdr (#6)

item.title: gardener/gardenctl-v2 - v2.13.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/gardenctl-v2:v2.13.0]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] ssh: Bastion ingress addresses and hostnames are now validated to prevent invalid IP addresses and non-DNS-compliant hostnames. by @petersutter [#678]
  • [USER] Added sanity checks for user-provided and shoot node SSH keys by @petersutter [#674]
  • [USER] The gardenctl ssh command now accepts a --shell flag to specify the shell used for escaping arguments when printing SSH commands. If not provided, it falls back to the GCTL_SHELL environment variable or defaults to bash. To set GCTL_SHELL automatically, source the gardenctl startup script in your shell profile (e.g., add source <(gardenctl rc bash) to ~/.bashrc), or use the --shell flag to avoid escaping issues. by @petersutter [#690]
  • [USER] provider-env: Added workload identity support for provider environments on AWS, Azure, and GCP. Use the --workload-identity-token-expiration flag to control token validity duration (default: 1h). by @petersutter [#659]

item.title: gardenlinux/glrd - glrd 4.1.0
item.description:
What's Changed

  • Add Lima Platform to fetch qcow2 image properly by @SujanaSubr in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glrd/pull/15

New Contributors

  • @SujanaSubr made their first contribution in https://github.com/gardenlinux/glrd/pull/15
Full Changelog: https://github.com/gardenlinux/glrd/compare/v4.0.0...v4.1.0

item.title: ironcore-dev/dpservice - v0.3.20
item.description:
Changes

🚀 Features

  • Container quality of life improvements @PlagueCZ (#742)
  • Add tcpdump\_helpers.inc to dpservice container @PlagueCZ (#741)
  • Remove unneeded packet type specifications in pytest @PlagueCZ (#739)
  • Log which loadbalancer already exists when adding fails @PlagueCZ (#740)
  • Add option to only dump a number of packets using dpservice-dump @PlagueCZ (#744)
  • Add port range to NAT full warning @PlagueCZ (#737)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Remove unneded mount of hugepages in init container @PlagueCZ (#743)
  • Fix telemetry free null-pointer bug @PlagueCZ (#731)

item.title: gardener/coredns-config-adapter - v0.4.0
item.description:
[github.com/gardener/coredns-config-adapter:v0.4.0]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] Correctly indent generated custom server blocks and enhance the update mechanism for server blocks to accurately handle scenarios where multiple keys are specified. by @DockToFuture [#7]

Container (OCI) Images

  • coredns-config-adapter: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/coredns-config-adapter:v0.4.0

item.title: openmcp-project/control-plane-operator - Release v0.1.19
item.description:
Changes included in v0.1.19:

🐛 Fixes

  • configurable labels #124
- [DEVLOPER][BUGFIX] Allow label customization with FluxReconciler and ObjectReconciler

item.title: ironcore-dev/ipam - v0.2.4
item.description:
Changes

  • Unify Readme licensing @damyan (#464)
  • Harmonize github workflows and templates @damyan (#452)

🚀 Features

  • Add ipamctl command @damyan (#466)
  • Bump golang-ci-lint to v2.4.0 @damyan (#483)

item.title: ironcore-dev/FeOS - FeOS 0.5.0
item.description:
FeOS 0.5.0 Release Notes

🚀 Highlights

  • Internal Architecture Improved
- Fully async, lock-free, event-driven approach
  • Testability
- Unit tests - Nested virtualization-based tests
  • Live Upgrade
- Support for FeOS PID1 live upgrade
  • Backend Flexibility
- Pluggable Rust-based backends: - VM-Service: Cloud Hypervisor / Other rust based vmms possible
  • Cloud Hypervisor
- Hard dependency eliminated
  • Host Service
- Enhanced features and improvements

item.title: ironcore-dev/ironcore-net - v0.2.4
item.description:
Changes

🚀 Features

  • Bump k8s.io/* deps to v1.33 and ironcore to v0.2.4 @afritzler (#442)
  • Introduce flag to enable/disable NetworkPeering in apinetlet @ushabelgur (#426)
  • Introduce node affinity awareness for apinet loadbalancers @balpert89 (#414)
  • Allow IP allocation from multiple public-prefixes of same IPFamily @Rohit-0505 (#412)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Add predicates to prevent unnecessary NIC reconciliation triggers @sujeet01 (#424)
  • Filter out destinations for noderefs that are already tracked @balpert89 (#422)
  • Retain labels of apinet nic before setting claimer labels @ushabelgur (#418)
  • Ignore LoadBalancerRoutings from other Networks @balpert89 (#416)
  • Allow IP allocation from multiple public-prefixes of same IPFamily @Rohit-0505 (#412)

🧰 Maintenance

  • Bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.25.1 to 2.25.3 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#438)
  • Extract OpenAPI specs and update Makefile @afritzler (#443)

item.title: openmcp-project/provider-upgrade-test - v1.0.0
item.description: Initial Release of the Upgrade tooling. Just to pin this version and don't break when someone messes with main.

item.title: ironcore-dev/ironcore - v0.2.4
item.description:
Changes

⚠️ Breaking

  • Change MachineClass capabilities to support arbitrary resources @ushabelgur (#1311)

🚀 Features

  • Add support for machine power update in irictl-machine @so-sahu (#1374)
  • Provide flag to enable pprof @ushabelgur (#1360)
  • Calculate detailed usage of bucket @ushabelgur (#1369)
  • Add downwardAPILabel support for Network and updated for NetworkInterface resource @Rohit-0505 (#1349)
  • Add the brokered downward-api NIC Labels in the machine aggregator @Rohit-0505 (#1355)
  • Introduce separate flags for NIC resource to support DownwardAPILabels propagation @Rohit-0505 (#1346)
  • Add proposal for VolumeSnapshot resource @afritzler (#802)
  • Add downwardAPILabels support for Networkinterface resource @Rohit-0505 (#1333)
  • Bump k8s.io/* deps to v1.33 @afritzler (#1310)
  • Update MachineRuntime to reflect Machine stopped @maxmoehl (#1328)
  • Add DownwardAPILabels support for Bucket @Rohit-0505 (#1324)
  • Add DownwardAPILabels support for Volume @Rohit-0505 (#1317)
  • Change MachineClass capabilities to support arbitrary resources @ushabelgur (#1311)
  • Extend MachineRuntime interface with UpdateVolume method @sujeet01 (#1312)
  • Ignore deleted Machines from listing of events and refactor error logging @ushabelgur (#1309)
  • Enhance Volume with effective Resources allocated in status @ushabelgur (#1296)
  • Implement IRI version method in bucket broker @ushabelgur (#1297)
  • Extended VolumeStatus with volume size @lukasfrank (#1294)
  • Extend BucketStatus to persist lower layer bucketID @Rohit-0505 (#1291)
  • Extend VolumeStatus to persist lower layer VolumeID @Rohit-0505 (#1289)
  • Reservation-Based Scheduling Proposal for Machines @lukasfrank (#1128)
  • Migrate proto generation to buf @afritzler (#1139)
  • Introduce ReclaimPolicy for ephemeral VirtualIP @Rohit-0505 (#1222)
  • Emit Event when Volume creation is exceeding ResourceQuota @ushabelgur (#1268)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Remove downward-api label filtering dependency @kasabe28 (#1363)
  • Fix flapping NICs @lukasfrank (#1364)
  • Update volume status received from IRI response @ushabelgur (#1342)
  • Fix re-creation of already existing machine by removing label key overwrite @balpert89 (#1335)
  • Fix CPU resource format in irictl @ushabelgur (#1337)
  • Fix collision in Bucket secret name @kasabe28 (#1329)
  • Remove redundant VirtualIP test case @ushabelgur (#1336)
  • Fix sporadic test failures in machinepoollet test suite @ushabelgur (#1330)
  • Prioritize downward API labels for identification in IRI machine list operation @balpert89 (#1334)
  • Fix Power state in Machine aggregation @lukasfrank (#1332)
  • Respect label filter in ListMachines @balpert89 (#1320)
  • Fix peering validation to allow IP range @balpert89 (#1322)
  • Add validation for ResourceQuota spec resource names. @ushabelgur (#1269)

🧰 Maintenance

item.title: ironcore-dev/metal-load-balancer-controller - v0.1.0
item.description:
Changes

🚀 Features

  • Remove init container in speaker @afritzler (#36)
  • Bump k8s.io/* deps to v0.32 @afritzler (#35)
  • Add init container for overlay-tunnel @hardikdr (#18)
  • Implement Node IPAM Controller @hardikdr (#14)
  • Add predicate filter for metalbond-speaker @afritzler (#8)
  • Fix container build @afritzler (#6)
  • Add lb and speaker controller + initial project setup @afritzler (#1)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Remove harcoded VNI from nexthop when announcing/deleting a route @damyan (#57)
  • Enable namespaced leader election @damyan (#56)
  • Set host bits to zero for PodCIDRs @hardikdr (#19)
  • Add finalizers and avoid re-announcing routes @hardikdr (#17)
  • Add Wait for the Peer Connection to be Established @hardikdr (#16)
  • Add Speaker Kustomization and RBAC @hardikdr (#15)
  • Update Daemonset Config @hardikdr (#7)
  • Fix container build @afritzler (#6)

🧰 Maintenance

  • Bump github.com/ironcore-dev/controller-utils from 0.9.8 to 0.9.9 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#48)
  • Update license in readme @afritzler (#55)
  • Bump golang to v1.24 @afritzler (#54)
  • Bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 6 to 8 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#52)

item.title: ironcore-dev/boot-operator - v0.2.0
item.description:
Changes

  • Reuse API update @sap-ospo-bot (#139)
  • Add support for Keppel image registry @defo89 (#134)
  • Support flat OCI Spec image @hardikdr (#133)

🚀 Features

  • Update Docker Publish Workflow @hardikdr (#174)
  • Add bootctl move command @SzymonSAP (#166)
  • Add support for UUID-specific iPXE scripts via /ipxe/\<uuid> @defo89 (#165)
  • Use upstream docs publishing workflow @ushabelgur (#164)
  • Avoid checking architecture while fetching nested OCI digests @hardikdr (#143)
  • Mark ServerBootConfig as Error for OCI images with invalid layer configuration @hardikdr (#142)
  • Fix apigroup in documentation and regenerate CRDs @hardikdr (#129)
  • Adapt Controllers with Updated OCI Image Format @hardikdr (#124)
  • Add Mkdocs-based Documentation and Automated API Reference Documentation Generation @hardikdr (#105)
  • Allow Processing BootConfigs without IgnitionSecRefs and Remove deprecated MachineBootConfig Reconciler @hardikdr (#104)
  • Bump k8s.io/* to v0.31.1 @afritzler (#96)
  • Update cmdline for pxe boot @hardikdr (#95)
  • Add config/dev kustomize @defo89 (#93)
  • Publish linux/arm64 Docker image @defo89 (#92)
  • Support indexing of uppercase SystemUUID search @defo89 (#91)
  • Support indexing of lowercase SystemUUID search @hardikdr (#90)
  • Support multiple ignition formats @hardikdr (#87)
  • Add Documentation for sample UKI Generation @hardikdr (#86)
  • Support IPXE Boot @hardikdr (#83)
  • Add tests for ServerBootconfiguration Controller @hardikdr (#78)
  • Update IgnitionSecretRef to ObjectRef @hardikdr (#74)
  • Add BootConfiguration Controller @hardikdr (#73)
  • Remove IPXE Boot @hardikdr (#68)
  • Support HTTPBoot conversion for ServerBootConfiguration @hardikdr (#62)
  • Support multiple SystemIPs as identifiers for bootconfigs @hardikdr (#59)
  • Improved Logs @hardikdr (#58)
  • Support /httpboot endpoint @hardikdr (#57)
  • Support configuring ipxe-scripts @hardikdr (#56)
  • Support X-Forwarded-For Header for parsing ClientIPs @hardikdr (#50)
  • Implement server to handle the HTTBootConfig @hardikdr (#42)
  • Implement HTTPBootConfig controller @hardikdr (#41)
  • Update APIs for the HTTPBootConfig @hardikdr (#40)
  • Add APIs for the HTTPBoot @hardikdr (#34)
  • Convert ignition to JSON using butane @hardikdr (#27)
  • Add ServerBootConfiguration controller @afritzler (#22)
  • Support default ipxe-script @hardikdr (#20)
  • Implement reverse image proxy @hardikdr (#17)

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Reconcile ServerBootConfig on Ignition Secret update @hardikdr (#145)
  • Update REUSE.toml @hardikdr (#141)
  • Fix apigroup in documentation and regenerate CRDs @hardikdr (#129)
  • Support case-insensitive search for UUIDs @hardikdr (#100)
  • Skip controller name validation @hardikdr (#97)
  • Update ipxe script template @hardikdr (#64)
  • Update default ipxe script template @hardikdr (#63)
  • Fix error handling in ipxe boot server @hardikdr (#43)
  • Fix Server RBAC @afritzler (#35)
  • Fix RBAC @hardikdr (#18)

🧰 Maintenance

  • Bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.8.1 to 1.9.1 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#172)
  • Bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.36.3 to 1.37.0 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#169)
  • Bump github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 from 2.23.3 to 2.23.4 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#170)
  • Bump golang from 1.24.1 to 1.24.2 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#168)
  • Bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.36.2 to 1.36.3 @[dependabot[bot]](https://github.com/apps/dependabot) (#161)

🚀 Features

item.title: gardener/pvc-autoscaler - v0.1.2
item.description:
[gardener/pvc-autoscaler]

✨ New Features

  • [USER] feat: introduce PersistentVolumeAutoscaler CRD by @dnaeon [#29]
  • [USER] Enable Static Application Security Testing (SAST) linter by @dnaeon [#15]

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • [OPERATOR] A bug, where a PVC could be subjected to excessive expansion while prometheus data lags behind actual PVC state, was fixed. by @andrerun [#13]

Docker Images

  • pvc-autoscaler: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/pvc-autoscaler:v0.1.2

gardener/machine-controller-manager-provider-equinix-metal - v0.8.0
item.description:
[gardener/machine-controller-manager-provider-equinix-metal]

⚠️ Breaking Changes

  • [OPERATOR] Change OCI Image Registry from GCR (eu.gcr.io/gardener-project) to Artifact-Registry (europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases). Users should update their references. by @zkdev [#24]

✨ New Features

  • [OPERATOR] Equinix Metal is deprecating facility deployment. Metros encompass multiple facilities and are a better fit for availability concerns.
The machine controller manager is now only doing metro deployments. Current facility deployed machines are handled as before and will be replaced with the next os or K8s update. by @schrodit [#23]

Docker Images

  • machine-controller-manager-provider-equinix-metal: europe-docker.pkg.dev/gardener-project/releases/gardener/machine-controller-manager-provider-equinix-metal:v0.8.0

item.title: open-component-model/ocm-spec - v0.1.0
item.description:
Release v0.1.0

This is the first release of the OCM Specification. This document aims to define and document the specifications for the Open Component Model, serving as a comprehensive guide for both stakeholders and implementations.
